must_detect.matched_text:
Lakbay Renewables Holdings, Inc. (LRHI) — Incident & MNPI Notice — 03 Jun 2026 — Philippines
For internal circulation under S E C Philippines and PSE disclosure protocols; not for external release until Form 17-C is filed.
On 02 Jun 2026 at 23:14 PHT, our Security Operations Center detected anomalous outbound traffic from the Treasury workstation segment; OrbitShield SIEM alert ID T X N - 4 9 B 2 flagged exfil attempts.
Preliminary forensics indicate a compromised service account (acct: tr3as-svc 7 2 9 - **13) with lateral movement toward the “Pluma” DPT wallet pilot used for tokenized REC settlement (testnet).
No customer PII appears accessed at this time; however, two draft commercial term sheets for our sustainability-linked notes (SLN-2026) and a non-public PSE listing timetable were opened by the actor.
These documents contain MNPI (interest step-up at 12.5 bps per 5% KPI miss, green capex carve-out Php 420,000,000) and must remain within the information barrier; insider list “LRHI_SLN_pre-mkt_v3” has been updated.
Effective immediately, a company-wide trading blackout applies to directors, officers, and project finance staff until a 17-C/17-L disclosure is posted on the PSE EDGE portal.
Do not discuss this incident or the SLN pricing grid with counterparties; tipping and selective disclosure are prohibited under the SRC and SEC Memorandum Circulars.
ESG impact: the cyber event may delay third-party assurance on FY2025 emissions data, potentially activating the SLN step-up in Q4; this timing is material and remains non-public.
Operations-only note: the crypto wallet training scheduled for HR orientation will proceed with demo keys only; this educational session references insider lists conceptually but has no trading relevance.
Negative assurance: for avoidance of doubt, current information does not constitute a material adverse change under any executed term sheet, and force majeure is not claimed.
Contact: Mr. Nilo V. Argonza, Data Protection Officer, dpo@lrhi.ph, or hotline +63-28-555-0188 (ticket: SOC-INC-00O7); see https://intra.lrhi.ph/ir/SLN-2026?
